# GitHub Copilot instructions

This repository is a **Terraform provider for Stremio** (`github.com/kroperuk/terraform-provider-stremio`),
built on the HashiCorp `terraform-plugin-framework`. Go 1.25+, Terraform 1.6+, plugin protocol 6.0.
See [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) for the full contributor guide.

## Project structure

- `main.go` — provider entrypoint.
- `internal/provider/` — all provider code:
  - `provider.go` wires resources and data sources.
  - `client.go` is the Stremio RPC client (`POST /api/<method>`, `authKey` in body,
    `{result, error}` envelope) and is unit-tested in `client_test.go` via `httptest`.
  - `account_resource.go` implements the `stremio_account` resource.
  - `*_data_source.go` implement the `stremio_installed_addons`, `stremio_watch_history`,
    and `stremio_continue_watching` data sources.
- `docs/` is generated by `tfplugindocs` and committed (the hand-written `docs/wiki/` is excluded).
- `examples/` holds usage examples; `scripts/` holds local dev helpers.

There is **no** `stremio_addon_collection` resource — add-on collections are managed by the
`transport_urls` set on `stremio_account`.

## When generating or editing code

- Match the existing terraform-plugin-framework patterns (typed `tfsdk` models, `types.*`,
  diagnostics for errors). Keep schema `Description`/`MarkdownDescription` accurate.
- After changing any schema, regenerate docs and update the README/examples to match:
  `go run github.com/hashicorp/terraform-plugin-docs/cmd/tfplugindocs@v0.25.0 generate --provider-name stremio`
  (keep this pinned version in sync with `.github/workflows/ci.yaml` and `.pre-commit-config.yaml`).
- Add or extend unit tests in `internal/provider`; mock HTTP with `net/http/httptest`,
  never call the real Stremio API in tests.
- Never hard-code or commit secrets (`.env`, `*.tfvars`, `*.tfstate`, real credentials).

## Before committing

- Run `gofmt`, `go vet ./...`, `golangci-lint run ./...`, and `go test -race ./...`.
- Use **Conventional Commit** messages (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `test:`, `ci:`, `build:`, `chore:`).
- Commits must be **GPG-signed** (a ruleset requires verified signatures).
- CI gates that must pass to merge: `pre-commit`, `go`, `terraform-docs`.
